TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tjisaulem ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 59 buwan, 166 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 157 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 84%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 9%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjisaulem hya' ga Puljekuwan. tay 'llaw na Tjisaulem hya' ga Tjakuvukuvulj. tay 'zil na Tjisaulem hya' ga Lemiyau. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč tjis~…ēaulem …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu rajijoŇč …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, ő≤unun *%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na tjis~…ēaulem ńßja Ē …£a puljekuwan. taj Ēllaw na tjis~…ēaulem ńßja Ē …£a tjaku*uku*ulj. taj Ēzil na tjis~…ēaulem ńßja Ē …£a lemijau. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Tjisaulem ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 59 buwan, 166 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 157 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 84%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 9%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjisaulem hya' ga Puljekuwan. tay 'llaw na Tjisaulem hya' ga Tjakuvukuvulj. tay 'zil na Tjisaulem hya' ga Lemiyau. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč tjis~…ēaulem …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu rajijoŇč …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, ő≤unun *%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na tjis~…ēaulem ńßja Ē …£a puljekuwan. taj Ēllaw na tjis~…ēaulem ńßja Ē …£a tjaku*uku*ulj. taj Ēzil na tjis~…ēaulem ńßja Ē …£a lemijau. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
